Garage
Bike Revival

We're Dylan and Nadav — two teens in La Jolla who love bikes and know how to fix them. Brake adjustments, chain lubes, tire inflation, full washes. We come to you, or drop it at the garage.

Guys. Real Work.

We Know Bikes.
We Live Here.

We're not a shop — we're your neighbors. Dylan and Nadav have been wrenching on bikes in the garage since middle school. Now we're turning that into something real.

We keep it honest: fair prices, no upselling, and we actually show up. Every bike gets cleaned up and rolling right before it leaves our hands.

what we're about

  • ✓ Neighborhood-only. We serve La Jolla — your street, your driveway, our garage.
  • ✓ Actually affordable. Teen prices, not shop prices. No surprises.
  • ✓ We care. Every bike leaves cleaner than it arrived. That's just how we roll.
  • ✓ Text us. No phone trees, no waiting. Just shoot us a message and we'll sort it out.

what we do

Services & Pricing

$20
Quick Tune
Fast fixes to get you back rolling.
  • Tire inflation (front & rear)
  • Quick wipe-down
  • Basic safety check
$30
Standard Service
Our most popular — covers all the basics.
  • Chain clean & lube
  • Brake adjustment
  • Tire inflation
  • Full bike wash & wipe
$40
Full Revival
Everything in Standard, plus extra attention for bikes that have been sitting.
  • Deep chain degrease & lube
  • Both brakes adjusted & tested
  • Gear shifting check
  • Full hand wash & dry
  • Tire inflation & inspection
$?
Something Else?
Not sure what your bike needs? Just ask. We'll take a look and give you a straight answer on what it needs and what it'll cost.
  • Free quick assessment
  • No obligation
  • Just text or email us
💡 Heads up: If your bike needs a part (brake pads, tubes, etc.) we'll let you know the cost before doing anything. Parts are extra, labor is covered in the price above.
